characters.description: An afterlife survivor occupying Vermil's body. He enters the Line to recover the key that can return his companions to the mortal plane, and uses Empty Proliferation to resist Wizen's attempt to control his mind.
characters.name: Noah Vines

characters.description: A powerful mage whose body is coming apart in the afterlife. He possesses the key Noah needs and uses formidable mind magic while pursuing an undisclosed purpose on the Line.
characters.name: Wizen

characters.description: A demon whose soul Noah recognizes among those on the Line. Wizen abandons his original plan and begins using Weave on her, leaving the result uncertain.
characters.name: Sticky

characters.description: The Lord of Death whose maintained portal lets Noah and Wizen reach the true afterlife. His domain in the Damned Plains provides Noah's only known route back from the Line.
characters.name: Sievan

characters.description: Wizen's daughter, who has remained on the Line for centuries. Recovering her is the private objective behind his struggle for the key and his forbidden use of Weave.
characters.name: Bella

characters.description: An official of the afterlife held responsible when Wizen removes a soul from the Line. Judgment strips her of office, and another god offers her a way to escape that authority.
characters.name: Renewal

characters.description: A god who observes Renewal's punishment, incapacitates Judgment, and offers Renewal escape. He stands outside the authority that has just condemned her.
characters.name: Fallen god

characters.description: A rank-eleven high god governing Renewal's region of the afterlife. Judgment removes Renewal from her position after Wizen's breach of the Line.
characters.name: Judgment

characters.description: Noah's partner and a combat protector. Zath brings her safely to Sievan's domain, where she reunites with Noah as the group searches for a way back to the mortal plane.
characters.name: Moxie

characters.description: Noah's demon companion, reunited with him in the Damned Plains after Zath brings her and Moxie to Sievan's domain. Her safety is confirmed while the group works to activate Wizen's key.
characters.name: Lee

characters.description: Sievan's subordinate, able to travel through a dark portal. He brings Moxie and Lee to the Damned Plains and helps reunite Noah's separated group.
characters.name: Zath

characters.description: One of Noah's students and a fire user. He fights a frog-like monster beside Emily, then stays with Isabel's group when advanced-track students try to steal their collected runes.
characters.name: Todd

characters.description: A student of Noah who carries the Soulmaster rune. She leads her exam group against hostile advanced-track students and personally forces their leader out of the test.
characters.name: Isabel

characters.description: An ice-pattern caster among Noah's students. During the exam she fights beside Todd, Isabel, and James, using an ice arrow to remove one of the students trying to steal their runes.
characters.name: Emily

characters.description: An allied student who can become invisible. He continues through the survival exam with Isabel, Todd, and Emily while Alexandra takes a separate route.
characters.name: James

characters.description: Noah's independently minded student. She separates from the others during the survival exam because she wants a greater challenge and trusts herself to face it alone.
characters.name: Alexandra

characters.description: An advanced-track student who leads five others in an attempt to take Isabel's group's collected runes. Isabel forces her out of the survival exam.
characters.name: Bethany

characters.description: A student attacker working with Jacob. He confronts Isabel's group with three accomplices, extensive soldier equipment, and externally supplied power well beyond an ordinary rank-two student's resources.
characters.name: Marley

characters.description: Jacob's student and Alexandra's sword-practice partner. She risks retaliation to warn Alexandra that Isabel's exam pendant was sabotaged and that Jacob intends to kill Isabel.
characters.name: Tauren swordfighter

characters.description: A peak rank-four professor who enters the exam to seize Isabel's Soulmaster rune. His plant-root magic overwhelms the students, and he admits that Marley has been acting on his behalf.
characters.name: Jacob

characters.description: Noah's artifact, capable of communicating by writing on its own pages. When Noah cannot reach his endangered students, it offers an intervention without first explaining the price.
characters.name: Sentient grimoire

characters.description: Noah's familiar, whom he summons while searching for a way to help his endangered students. Mascot cannot carry Noah out of the Damned Plains when ordinary travel is too slow.
characters.name: Mascot

characters.description: The Linwick family head and a powerful spatial mage monitoring the students' exam. He honors Mascot's written instruction not to intervene even as the hidden observers see the danger worsening.
characters.name: Jalen

characters.description: Vermil's half-brother and one of the temporary guardians watching over the students. He remains with Jalen and the other observers while Mascot's message directs them not to interfere.
characters.name: Brayden

characters.description: A combat instructor and cautious ally of Noah's group. He monitors the exam with Jalen and Brayden, trusting Mascot's warning despite the students' immediate peril.
characters.name: Silvertide

characters.description: A water mage who supports Jacob's plot and appears after the grimoire's manifestation withdraws. He heals Jacob and renews the attack on the exhausted students.
characters.name: Second rogue professor

characters.description: The divine source whose power binds Lee's original demon rune to her body and soul. Lee reaches into that source after breaking the seal on the corrupted rune.
characters.name: Decras

characters.description: An Inquisitor who independently investigates missing officials, demonic traces, and suppressed records around Arbitage. He confronts the Linwick patriarch and collapses after attacking him.
characters.name: Investigating Inquisitor

characters.description: A Linwick family leader confronted during an inquiry into demonic activity around Arbitage. He admits a past connection to demons, withstands the Inquisitor's attack, and incapacitates him through an unexplained power.
characters.name: Linwick patriarch

characters.description: A masked demon who confirms that Yoru and Yoku are both her names. She joins Noah's demon group as its members meet his students and allies in the mortal plane.
characters.name: Yoru

characters.description: A protective demon allied with Noah and an older sibling to younger demons in the group. Violet promises to defend Noah's people unless they endanger those under that protection.
characters.name: Violet

characters.description: Violet's younger sibling, with an involuntary ability to examine or consume runic energy. He accidentally hurts Todd while trying to understand how the student's fire magic works.
characters.name: Horned demon boy

characters.description: A powerful investigator who memorizes the world's runic patterns closely enough to detect concealed planar intrusions. She traces Noah's unauthorized return and moves toward the resulting disturbance.
characters.name: Garina

characters.description: A dangerous intruder who uses crimson energy to forcibly reshape a wounded captive's body and voice. He remains active while searching for his missing face.
characters.name: Body-altering man

characters.description: Yoru's coercive master rune, which has directed her actions and denied her meaningful choice. Yoru withdraws power from it and avoids future sight while seeking Noah's help to break its control.
characters.name: Moonlit Prophecy

characters.description: The identity Noah plans to use at a major auction while keeping the supposedly dead Vermil out of public view.
characters.name: Spider

characters.description: A rank-seven apostle who arrives after sensing divine power and challenges Garina's explanation for Noah's presence. He has previously matched Garina in a spar and refuses to accept her cover story without scrutiny.
characters.name: Second apostle

characters.description: A concealed high-ranked demon who speaks for the demons hidden throughout the auction house.
characters.name: Auction demon leader

characters.description: A female operative in the demon seizure of the auction house. She is strong enough to participate in the takeover, but Jalen captures her decisively with spatial magic.
characters.name: Vengeance demon

characters.description: An unseen organizer who reportedly arranged the demon operation at the auction through lethal red-energy portals. The contact ordered chaos and selected killings while hiding both an identity and the object being sought.
characters.name: Red-portal contact

characters.description: An unidentified powerful figure who decides to redirect the Church of Repose after learning that it sent a rank-eight searcher into his domain. He detects the birth of chaos in the Arbalest Kingdom, but his identity remains unresolved.
characters.name: Unidentified powerful figure

characters.description: An Arbitage associate who has maintained Vermil's old room and helped care for Mascot during his absence. She discovers that Vermil has returned with Moxie, students, and demon companions.
characters.name: Contessa

characters.description: An Advanced Track professor who arrives at Vermil's room and discovers him alive among his demon companions.
characters.name: Advanced Track professor

characters.description: A transport-cannon researcher and spatial mage trusted with the depleted key. His independent measurements suggest that magical conditions change systematically toward the Empire's boundaries.
characters.name: Tim

characters.description: The cloaked intruder deep within the breached Linwick archives. He effortlessly disperses Jalen's concentrated spatial attack before revealing their relationship.
characters.name: Jalen's father
